title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
